questionHtml: The lung tumour in the light micrograph was slow-growing. Predict with a reason what would have been visible in the micrograph if the tumour was growing rapidly.
markschemeHtml:
See

a. more mitosis
OR
cells in prophase/metaphase/anaphase/telophase;

Why

b. more dividing cells/tumour cell divide uncontrollably
OR
a higher mitotic index;

meta.title: The lung tumour in the light micrograph was slow-growing. Predict with a reason what would have been visible in the micrograph if the tumour was growing rapidly.
breadcrumbLabels: D2.1.17. Differences between tumours in rates of cell division and growth and in the capacity for metastasis and invasion of neighbouring tissue
